response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video for scene breaks (intro, performance part 1, performance part 2). 2. Identified two songs from on-screen metadata: 'FG ROADSTER' and '24K GOLD'. 3. Searched for lyrics for both using composer names (Potiomukin, LUNA, Joe Ogawa, chomo) and titles. 4. Obtained full Japanese lyrics for both songs and verified they match the performance. 5. Structured data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A performance video by the VTuber group Flow Glow, featuring their songs 'FG ROADSTER' and '24K GOLD'. The performance is set against a high-speed driving theme.

scenes.description: Introductory sequence featuring high-speed driving animations, no vocal music.
The VTuber group Flow Glow performs 'FG ROADSTER'. Vocal music begins. Text 'Music: ボチヲムキン / LUNA / Joe Ogawa / chomo' appears on screen.
